title: Susan's Bread Pudding with Vanilla Sauce
description: A cozy baked bread pudding spiced with cinnamon and nutmeg, served warm under a rich brown sugar vanilla cream sauce.

ingredients.heading: Bread Pudding
items: 2½ cups unseasoned toasted bread cubes (from 12-oz. pkg.)
¼ cup firmly packed brown sugar

ingredients.heading: Vanilla Sauce
items: ⅓ cup firmly packed brown sugar

instructions: Heat oven to 350°F. Grease a 1-quart casserole. In the greased casserole, combine the bread cubes and milk; mix well.
In a medium bowl, combine ¼ cup brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, ½ teaspoon vanilla, and eggs; blend well. Add the egg mixture to the bread cube mixture; mix well.
Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until the pudding is set.

In a small saucepan, combine the sugar, ⅓ cup brown sugar, whipping cream, and butter; mix well. Cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring occasionally. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla. Serve the warm sauce over the warm pudding.
